_comment: INITIAL VALUES — ported from an initial left.json (T_tcp_camera) by composing with the flange->tcp tool offset: T_flange_cam = translate(0,0,-135.8mm) @ T_tcp_camera. MUST be validated on the real Piper (see docs/piper_pick_box_migration_design.md §7/§9 V2). 'object.xyz_base_mm' is a PLACEHOLDER table-height anchor and MUST be re-measured: it sets z_min_safe (= object_z + z_safe_margin) and the fallback home height.

T_flange_cam._frame: camera pose in flange frame; translation in mm

_intrinsics_comment: LIVE-measured on RealSense SN 349622073363 @ 640x480 color (2026-06-08). the prior 392.69 was NOT this camera's 640x480 color intrinsic (wrong scale → back-projection error). distortion is factory-rectified (all zeros).

object._comment: PLACEHOLDER — re-measure on the real robot. xyz of the calibration/table anchor in base frame (mm).
